task_completion.description: Apply heading hierarchies (H1 and H2) to the specified sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the expected H1 sections (e.g., 'Introduction', 'Stratigraphic Context') and H2 subsections (e.g., 'Lithics', 'Ceramics') styled with distinct, larger, or bolder fonts compared to the regular body text, indicating heading styles were applied in Calligra Words.

task_completion.description: Insert images from the Field_Photos directory into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for one or more images or photos visually embedded within the pages of the document in the Calligra Words interface.

task_completion.description: Create and populate a radiocarbon results table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a grid or table structure inserted into the document containing the radiocarbon data keywords (e.g., 'beta-12345', '1250', '1310').
Look for the biological taxa names (e.g., 'Zea mays', 'Phaseolus vulgaris', 'Odocoileus hemionus', 'Meleagris gallopavo') appearing with slanted, italicized font formatting in the document text.

task_completion.description: Save the final version of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking the save button (floppy disk icon), using the File -> Save menu, or the title bar showing 'site_report_draft.odt' without an unsaved changes indicator (such as an asterisk) at the end of the trajectory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacts with the Calligra Words graphical interface (menus, toolbars, dialogs) to apply formatting, insert images, and create the table.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent does not use terminal commands (like python scripts, sed, or zip/unzip commands) to modify the .odt file contents directly.

integrity.description: Ensure a real table element was used for the radiocarbon results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the radiocarbon results are placed inside a visible table grid in Calligra Words, rather than just being typed out as plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected H1 sections: Introduction, Stratigraphic Context, Artifact Assemblage, Chronometric Dating, Conclusions. Expected H2 subsections: Lithics, Ceramics, Faunal Remains, Archaeobotanical Remains. Taxa to italicize: Zea mays, Phaseolus vulgaris, Odocoileus hemionus, Meleagris gallopavo. Radiocarbon table data must include: beta-12345, beta-12346, beta-12347, 1250, 1310, 1280.
